summary: Created provenance verification layer with verify.py implementing fuzzy substring matching. System validates that 'our_take' fields exist in source documents with 95% similarity threshold and confirms story IDs are present. Integrated --source flag into validate.py for seamless workflow. Testing confirms zero hallucination on current decomposer outputs.
test_results:
✅ verify.py CLI working correctly
✅ Tested on hardik-flowfuse: 43/43 our_take fields + 21/21 story IDs verified
✅ Tested on sridhar-flowfuse: 33/33 our_take fields + 36/36 story IDs verified
✅ validate.py --source integration functional
✅ rapidfuzz dependency properly handled
✅ Error handling and exit codes working
learnings: rapidfuzz.fuzz.partial_ratio with 0.95 threshold effectively distinguishes between verbatim quotes and paraphrasing
Current decomposer outputs show no hallucination issues in tested samples - verification passes 100%
Integration pattern preserves backward compatibility while adding verification capability
Story ID verification catches completely fabricated identifiers that don't exist in source
verification_notes: Task was previously implemented. Current Drop worker verified functionality, tested on multiple datasets, and confirmed all requirements met per the brief.
